clean-architecture-example/db/src/main/j.general_idea: Replaced tab-based indentation with spaces to align with modern Java coding standards.
clean-architecture-example/db/src/main/j.human_impl: Changed leading tabs to spaces in class body and method definitions.

clean-architecture-example/db/src/main/j.general_idea: Removed an unnecessary blank line between import statements to tighten code structure.
Replace setter-based object initialization with a constructor call to improve conciseness and immutability.
Normalize code indentation from tabs to spaces for consistent formatting.
clean-architecture-example/db/src/main/j.human_impl: Changed leading tabs to spaces in method body.

clean-architecture-example/db/src/main/j.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
Remove the @Data annotation from Lombok to manually define getters and setters.
Add explicit getter and setter methods for fields previously handled by Lombok.
Change indentation from tabs to spaces for consistent code style.

clean-architecture-example/entities/src/.general_idea: Replace a standard POJO class with fields and manual getters/setters with a Java record to leverage concise syntax and immutability.
clean-architecture-example/entities/src/.human_impl: public record Student(String name, int age) {}

clean-architecture-example/rest/src/main.general_idea: Replaced tab-based indentation with spaces to align with modern Java coding standards.
clean-architecture-example/rest/src/main.human_impl: Changed leading tabs to spaces in method bodies and field declarations.

clean-architecture-example/rest/src/main.general_idea: Removed an unnecessary blank line between import statements to tighten code structure.
clean-architecture-example/rest/src/main.human_impl: Deleted empty line after Spring imports before custom package imports.

clean-architecture-example/rest/src/main.general_idea: Replace a Lombok-annotated POJO with a Java record to leverage built-in immutability and reduce boilerplate.
clean-architecture-example/rest/src/main.human_impl: public record StudentDto(String name, int age) {}

clean-architecture-example/rest/src/main.general_idea: Replace manual setter calls with a constructor invocation to initialize the DTO fields directly.
Update field accessors to use record component methods instead of traditional getter methods.
Normalize code indentation to use 2 spaces instead of mixed tabs/spaces.
